description: Reduces the rage cost of your Sweeping Strikes ability by 100%.

name: Glyph of Victory Rush
description: Your Victory Rush ability has a 30% increased critical strike chance.

name: Glyph of Vigilance
description: Your Vigilance ability transfers an additional 5% of your target's threat to you.

name: Glyph of Whirlwind
description: Reduces the cooldown of your Whirlwind by 2 sec.

name: Impale
description: Crossover Talent Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by 20%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Impale Talent.

name: Improved Bloodrage
description: Crossover Talent Increases the rage generated by your Bloodrage ability by 50%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Bloodrage Talent.

name: Improved Charge
description: Crossover Talent Increases the amount of rage generated by your Charge ability by 10. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Charge Talent.

name: Improved Cleave
description: Crossover Talent Increases the bonus damage done by your Cleave ability by 120%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Cleave Talent.

name: Improved Demoralizing Shout
description: Crossover Talent Increases the melee attack power reduction of your Demoralizing Shout by 40%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Demoralizing Shout Talent.

name: Improved Execute
description: Crossover Talent Reduces the rage cost of your Execute ability by 5. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Execute Talent.

name: Improved Heroic Strike
description: Crossover Talent Reduces the cost of your Heroic Strike ability by 3 rage points. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Heroic Strike Talent.

name: Improved Overpower
description: Crossover Talent Increases the critical strike chance of your Overpower ability by 50%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Overpower Talent.

name: Improved Rend
description: Crossover Talent Increases the bleed damage done by your Rend ability by 20%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Rend Talent.

name: Improved Revenge
description: Crossover Talent Increases damage of your Revenge ability by 60% and causes Revenge to strike an additional target. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Revenge Talent.

name: Improved Thunder Clap
description: Crossover Talent Reduces the cost of your Thunder Clap ability by 4 rage points and increases the damage by 30% and the slowing effect by an additional 10%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Improved Thunder Clap Talent.

name: Incite
description: Crossover Talent Increases the critical strike chance of your Heroic Strike, Thunder Clap and Cleave abilities by 15%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Incite Talent.

name: Iron Will
description: Crossover Talent Reduces the duration of all Stun and Charm effects used against you by 20%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Iron Will Talent.

name: Puncture
description: Crossover Talent Reduces the rage cost of your Sunder Armor and Devastate abilities by 3. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Puncture Talent.

name: Shield Mastery
description: Crossover Talent Increases your block value by 30% and reduces the cooldown of your Shield Block ability by 20 sec. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Shield Mastery Talent.

name: Shield Specialization
description: Crossover Talent Increases your chance to block attacks with a shield by 5% and has a 100% chance to generate 5 rage when a block, dodge, or parry occurs. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Shield Specialization Talent.

name: Tactical Mastery
description: Crossover Talent You retain up to an additional 15 of your rage points when you change stances. Also greatly increases the threat generated by your Bloodthirst and Mortal Strike abilities when you are in Defensive Stance (More effective than Rank 2). This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Tactical Mastery Talent.

name: Taste for Blood
description: Crossover Talent Whenever your Rend ability causes damage, you have a 100% chance of allowing the use of your Overpower ability for 9 sec. 1 charge. This effect will not occur more than once every 6 sec. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Taste for Blood Talent.

name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
description: Crossover Talent Increases the damage you deal with two-handed melee weapons by 6%. This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Two-Handed Weapon Specialization Talent.

name: Unbridled Wrath
description: Crossover Talent Gives you a chance to generate an additional rage point when you deal melee damage with a weapon. Effect occurs more often than Unbridled Wrath (Rank 4). This Mystic Enchant does not stack with the Unbridled Wrath Talent.
